title: 12Pcs Christmas Glitter Berries Stems, 7.9Inch Silver Berries Christmas Picks, Artificial Holly Berry Twig for Christmas Tree Decoration Xmas Garland Wreath Making DIY Craft Holiday and Home Ornament
features: 【Glitter Silver Berries】Our artificial berry stems are covered with glitter silver powder on the surface of the berries and stems, making them look lifelike that as if a layer of icing is covering on berries, beautiful and shiny.
【Berry Stems】Glitter berries are made of foam balls and wire. Lightweight to hang on anywhere you like, the stem attached to the berry is easily bent and operated according to your needs.

【Glitter Branches for Christmas Tree】12Pcs Christmas glitter berry stems, each stem contains approximately15 berries, vivid colors will live your Xmas tree up, making your home full of holiday atmosphere.

【Christmas Picks】The total length of the berry stem measures about 20cm/7.9inch, while the diameter of the berry is about 1.5cm/0.59 inch, proper size makes your gifts and crafts more exquisite and elegant.

【Widely Use】YUNSTK artificial berries Ideal for your home and party decoration, dining tables, Christmas tree, Christmas garlands, wreath, present packing, DIY crafts, ideal for wedding, birthday, and baby shower.
description: Features: Make a great addition to your Christmas and holiday decoration. Perfect home decor for Christmas, wedding, engagement, anniversary, party, etc. It is also a perfect fit for decoration in farmhouses, hotels, restaurants, office buildings, and so on. Specifications: Material: foam balls and wire Color: silver Package included: 12 x silver berries Christmas decorations Notes: Manual measuring, please allow 1 ~ 2mm error, thank you. It's normal if the glitter powder slightly falls off. Wipe gently when you receive the product.
